questions.question: Describe the key differences between supervised and unsupervised learning. How do these differences impact the type of neural network architecture that can be used for each? (10 marks)
What is the main difference between a neural network and a decision tree? Provide an example of when each would be used. (5 marks)
Explain the concept of activation functions in neural networks and provide examples of commonly used activation functions such as sigmoid and ReLU. (10 marks)
